title: Polycell One Coat Damp Seal 500ML & Fit for The Job 10 pc Mixed Sizes Paint Brush Set for a Smooth Finish with Emulsion, Gloss
features: Product 1: Seals patches of penetrating damp
Product 1: For interior walls and ceilings
Product 1: One coat matt white finish

Product 2: Tackle any decorating project with this super value 10 piece paintbrush set containing 2x 0.5" (12mm), 3x 1" (25mm), 3x 1.5" (38mm) and 2x 2" (50mm) brushes - ideal for a range of tasks including cutting in edges of walls and ceilings, painting door architraves, window sills, skirting board, doors, cabinets and panels.
Product 2: The 100% synthetic filaments hold the right amount of paint and give smooth application with each stroke for a finish you'll be proud of.

Product 2: Ideal for emulsions (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), gloss, satin, undercoat and primer as well as woodstains and varnishes, the brushes are easy to clean after use with warm running water and their stainless steel ferrule is rust-proof, so they will last for many painting jobs.

Product 2: The 0.5" and 1" small paint brushes are ideal for getting into narrow or awkward areas, as well as touching up scuffs and marks. The 1" and 1.5" brushes are ideal for painting mouldings like skirting board and architrave. The 2" medium size is ideal for cutting in with emulsion and painting flat areas of wood like window sills.
description: Polycell One Coat Damp Seal 500ML Polycell Damp Seal has been specially formulated to seal patches of penetrating damp on interior walls and ceilings in just one coat, preventing them from showing through and spoiling decorations. Damp Seal has a matt white finish that can be over pain Fit For The Job 10 pc Mixed Sizes Paint Brush Set for a Smooth Finish with Emulsion, Gloss, Satin on Walls, Ceilings, Woodwork, Metal - 2X 0.5, 3X 1, 3X 1.5, 2X 2 inch Paint Brushes for Wood, Plaster Suited to water-based paints, woodstains and varnishes, these brushes are ideal for wider DIY projects or just simple touching up of paintwork. The range of sizes makes them ideal for accessing narrow and awkward places, painting moulded surfaces such as skirting board and architraves, cutting in with emulsion and painting wider areas of wood and metal.
